settings.author: Penny
settings.title: A Gift Worth Sharing
settings.content: My dad is impossible to shop for because he has everything he needs. I came across BroBasket and sent him a basket with a bottle of Scotch. My Dad LOVED it. He’s even arranging a sampling with his friends! I Will definitely be buying again.

settings.author: Jared
settings.title: Mom LOVED it!!!
settings.content: When my mom celebrated her birthday last month, I wanted to get her something different to the "hope you like it" gifts I normally get her. When her BroBasket arrived, she was on the phone to me straight away so excited with her California Wine and Coffee Gift Basket. Her love of a cheeky wine paired with her love of coffee was spot on! Great gift. Thanks so much BroBasket! Fabulous basket! You've got a customer for life in me! :)

settings.author: Vanessa
settings.title: A Unique Way To Celebrate
settings.content: My husband and I wanted to do something special for our son’s 25th birthday since we couldn’t celebrate together. Being the great parents we are, we sent our son a custom gift from BroBasket. He LOVED it! The ordering process was super easy and made his day a little more special. Thank you!

settings.title: Get Personalized Support
settings.content: Need a little help customizing your perfect gift basket from the experts? We’re here for you! Reach out and work with a member of our spirited Customer Experience team and let them handle the details. Let us know what you’re planning, and we’ll make recommendations and arrangements to deliver the perfect business gifts.
settings.link_text: Talk to a customer experience member

settings.title: Do It Yourself
settings.content: Already have the perfect gift in mind? Great! Choose from our wide selection of baskets, bottles, and other gift items to build a custom corporate gift basket for clients or team members. Personalize it with a unique engraving, tailor it to their tastes, and add your company swag. Get creative, or choose a classic gift box. Whatever you decide, it will be a gift they’ll enjoy.

settings.subheading: From 2 to 200 We Got Your Covered
settings.title: Self-Service Corporate Gifting
settings.content:
Need to send gifts to a group quickly? Our self-service option makes it easy to place a single order for up to 100 recipients in just a few minutes. Upload a list of addresses for physical gift baskets, or send digital gift links that allow recipients to choose their preferred basket. Every order includes personalized gift messages, delivery scheduling, and shipment tracking so you can manage everything in one place.

✓ Place your order in minutes — no back-and-forth required

✓ Choose between sending a physical gift basket or a digital gift link

✓ Upload up to 100 recipient addresses or emails per order

✓ Add a personalized message to every gift

✓ Schedule deliveries up to 8 weeks in advance

settings.title: Easy Delivery to Multiple Addresses
settings.content: Checkout all of your gifts to just one location and we'll upload your addresses for you!

settings.title: Engravings
settings.content: Add custom engravings to wine and liquor bottles for extra flair.

settings.title: Hands On Support
settings.content: Our Customer Experience team makes ordering easy and streamlined.

settings.title: Fast Shipping
settings.content: We deliver your business gift baskets where and when they’re needed.

settings.title: Alcohol-free Options
settings.content: Our wide assortment of gift baskets also includes alcohol-free options.

settings.title: We can do it all
settings.content: You can count on us for large orders of unique gift baskets, one-off custom corporate gifts that feature your logos, promotional items, and more. If it’s a business gift box you’re after, you’re in the right place.

settings.title: What type of corporate gifts do you offer?
settings.content: We offer unique, personalized gifts for your employees, clients, and special events. We’re committed to providing great taste, comfort, and joy with every delivery. Our corporate gift baskets can be standalone items, such as engraved products and spirit bottles, or customized gift baskets, with a curated selection of goodies for any taste bud, style, or craving.

settings.title: Can I remove the BroBasket logo from the baskets?
settings.content: Yes, we can replace any of our BroBasket branded items with ones without a logo or branding on gifts. You can also add your company logo to the gift baskets at no additional cost. We know your employees will be thrilled to get a custom gift adorned with the company logo.

settings.title: How long will shipping take?
settings.content: Shipping varies based on the location of your recipient. We work with UPS to offer ground, overnight, and two-day or three-day shipping. Ground shipping can take anywhere from 1 to 5 days, depending on your recipient’s location. Calculate your shipping times at checkout for a more accurate estimate of the arrival of your business gift baskets.

settings.title: Can I ship to multiple addresses within one transaction?
settings.content: Yes, you can! Get in touch with our Customer Experience team before or after completing your order and provide them with the list of addresses. We’ll upload it into our system to ensure each gift gets delivered to the right place. You can simply check out as if you are delivering all of your baskets to one location, and we’ll handle the rest.

settings.title: What if we don’t know all recipients’ addresses?
settings.content: It’s OK if you don’t know all your recipients’ addresses before placing your order. Just be sure to collect them and send them to our Customer Experience team early enough for us to ship the baskets to your recipients in time! It’s that easy.
